resources.string: Linux desktop on Android · Termux + VNC
Termux is not installed. PocketLinux uses Termux as its Linux runtime — install it from F-Droid (the Play Store version is broken).
Your Termux is from the Play Store, which is abandoned and won\'t work with PocketLinux. Please uninstall it and install the F-Droid version instead.

Termux is installed but won't accept commands. Open Termux and run:

echo "allow-external-apps=true" >> ~/.termux/termux.properties

then tap Re-check.
Pick a Linux distribution and window manager. You can change later by long-pressing the Launch button.
Installing %1$s. This will take 5-15 minutes depending on your network and device.
Couldn\'t start the VNC session. Check that the install completed.
This forgets the chosen distro so you can pick again. The Linux files inside Termux are NOT deleted — to remove those, run \"proot-distro remove <name>\" inside Termux.
